text.title: pnpm-package-management Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for pnpm-package-management as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running `npm install` or `yarn add` in a pnpm repo, creating a `package-lock.json` or `yarn.lock` alongside pnpm-lock.yaml.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Mixed lockfiles cause non-deterministic installs and CI failures. Enforce with `preinstall: "npx only-allow pnpm"` and add `package-lock.json` / `yarn.lock` to `.gitignore`.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without a committed lockfile, CI installs different versions from development, causing "works on my machine" bugs. Always commit the lockfile.

failure-mode.description: Setting `shamefully-hoist=true` to fix a "module not found" error.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hoisting hides phantom dependency bugs and makes the project behave like npm. Fix phantom deps by adding the missing dep explicitly with `pnpm add`.

failure-mode.description: Editing package.json dependencies by hand instead of using `pnpm add` / `pnpm remove`.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Manual edits bypass peer-dependency resolution, producing an inconsistent lockfile. Always use pnpm CLI commands.

failure-mode.description: Using `pnpm audit` in a retry loop when no fix exists for a transitive CVE.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: `pnpm audit` exits non-zero even for CVEs with no fix. Use `pnpm audit --prod` to skip dev deps; check reachability with `pnpm why`; pin via `.pnpmfile.cjs` if truly reachable and unfixed.

failure-mode.description: Using `pnpm add x` at workspace root without `--filter` intending to add to a sub-package.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without --filter, the dep installs at the root, not the intended package. Always scope with `--filter <pkg-name>`.
